emails.subject: Re: Hard Lessons from California
emails.body: Re: Hard Lessons from California Jeff thanks. I am using this stuff on Monday and Tuesday when we see people in Finance and Energy here. Here is my own contribution to the discussion something I wrote a few months ago and recently revised.

emails.subject: Re: Hard Lessons from California
emails.body: Re: Hard Lessons from California Aleck: I'll take a look at it. If I have any comments, I'll forward them along. Also, I may forward along some very slight changes to the numbers on the ISO's RFP "experience," should you decide you want to incorporate those "lessons" into your presentation. I'll provide any amendments to those numbers by tomorrow. Best, Jeff
